message:
refactor(cleanup): remove dead code from curate.ts and semantic.ts

Remove unused code discovered during systematic code review:

curate.ts - Remove unused `buildHashCache` function (11 lines)
  - This function built a Set<string> of content hashes from playbook bullets
  - It was superseded by `bulletContentMap` (a Map<string, PlaybookBullet>)
    in the optimized `curatePlaybook()` implementation (commit 1fc6da0)
  - The function was never called anywhere in the codebase
  - The Map-based approach is superior as it provides O(1) lookup of the
    actual bullet, not just existence checking

semantic.ts - Remove redundant dynamic imports in loadEmbedder() (2 lines)
  - Removed: `const { withLock } = await import("./lock.js");`
  - Removed: `const { resolveGlobalDir } = await import("./utils.js");`
  - Both symbols are already imported statically at file top (lines 9-10):
    - `import { withLock } from "./lock.js";`
    - `import { ..., resolveGlobalDir, ... } from "./utils.js";`
  - The dynamic imports were completely redundant and added unnecessary
    overhead to the async function

Verification:
  - All 2189 tests pass (0 failures)
  - Semantic tests: 19 pass
  - Curate tests: 48 pass

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
